query: AI productivity tool launched on Product Hunt July 3 2026 review

results.title: Best of Product Hunt: July 3, 2026
results.content:
- Launch tags: Mac, Productivity, Developer Tools
   - Categories: Toys, Games
4. Osloq - An AI agent that reproduces GitHub issues for you
   - Description: Most AI dev tools just read your code and guess. Osloq actually runs it. Connect your GitHub, pick an issue, and an AI agent spins up a real sandbox, clones your repo, runs it, and tries to reproduce the bug the way a developer would. You get a report backed by real evidence. What happened, the steps it took, and whether the bug is real, not a hallucinated guess. No local setup, no "works on my machine." It handles the tedious reproduction step so you jump straight to fixing.
   - Score: 199
   - Comments: 54
   - Product Hunt page: 
   - External URL: 
   - Launch tags: Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub [...] 6. nxt - Talk to your to do list and get what's next
   - Description: nxt is the AI task manager you talk to like a human assistant. Brain-dump your thoughts in plain language - nxt reads between the lines, extracts tasks, infers priorities, and files everything automatically. It understands what you mean, not just what you say. nxt learns your personal context, so your tasks flex around your life. When you're ready to act, nxt cuts through the noise and gives you one clear task, one reason why. No scrolling, no paralysis, no overwhelming list to wade through.
   - Score: 145
   - Comments: 40
   - Product Hunt page: 
   - External URL: 
   - Launch tags: Productivity, Task Management, Artificial Intelligence
7. Vox - Voice in, voice out — with GitHub Copilot [...] 1. Glaze by Raycast - Create your own Mac apps by chatting with AI
   - Description: Glaze is the easiest way to go from an idea to a Mac app. Describe what you want, and it builds a real app that lives in your dock, launches instantly, works offline, and taps into the full power of your computer. Software that's finally personal, shaped around you. From the makers of Raycast.
   - Score: 466
   - Comments: 81
   - Product Hunt page: 
   - External URL: 
   - Launch tags: Mac, Productivity, Artificial Intelligence
   - Categories: Productivity
2. Goals from Loops - Measure whether a campaign drove the desired outcome
   - Description: A better way to send marketing and transactional email.

results.title: The best AI agents in 2026 | Product Hunt
results.content:
Sources:Image 103: Tony CantafioreviewImage 104: Craig HarmanreviewImage 105: Jason Lairdreview

Recent launches

Recent AI agent launches skew toward practical workflow automation, with products spanning personal context capture, design execution, and governed enterprise operations. AirJelly focuses on private, on-device memory and task extraction across apps, while Genspark Design and Adapt emphasize turning prompts into usable assets, code, analytics, and cross-tool actions with stronger sharing, control, and deployment features."

results.title: The best AI software to try in 2026 | Product Hunt
results.content:
Recent launches

"Recent AI launches skew toward workflow-specific tools rather than general chat: T-Rex Label accelerates computer-vision annotation with zero-shot, bulk labeling; Glide turns spreadsheets and databases into operational apps with automations and AI helpers; Phygital+ centralizes multi-model creative pipelines for on-brand image, video, audio, and batch content production."

T-Rex Label Data Annotation Tool: One-Click AI-assisted Annotation9mo ago

Image 87: Glide

Image 88: Phygital+

Phygital+30+ AI Tools in one place. Consistent, on-brand results.11mo ago
